name: Jiangsu Azure Corporation
summary: Jiangsu Azure Corporation operates as a metal logistics and distribution company. It provides supply chain services, including warehousing, sorting, cutting, packaging, distribution, and processing of metal materials. The company is also involved in the research and development, production, and sale of LED chips. In addition, it offers lithium-ion batteries used in power tools, smart homes, new energy power travel, and other products. The company was formerly known as Jiangsu Aucksun Co., Ltd. Jiangsu Azure Corporation is based in Suzhou, China.
